prompt: Can you update docs_wiki/DEVELOPMENT.md to add a new section about using the cache? It should go after the 'Using Plugins from Services' section. The caching package is at pkg/caching/ and provides a CachingManager that wraps go-redis with cache-aside pattern, TTL support, and batch invalidation. The config key is 'caching' under services in config.yaml. Write a section called 'Using the Cache' with a code example showing how to inject it via Dependencies and use the cache-aside pattern.

assertions.text: Adds a new 'Using the Cache' section at the appropriate location (after 'Using Plugins from Services')
assertions.name: adds-cache-section

assertions.text: Includes a Go code example using the module path stackyrd-nano/pkg/caching
assertions.name: correct-import-path

assertions.text: Code example shows getting the CachingManager from deps.Get
assertions.name: deps-injection

assertions.text: Shows the cache-aside pattern (check cache, miss, load from DB, store in cache)
assertions.name: cache-aside-pattern

assertions.text: Mentions the config toggle services.caching in config.yaml
assertions.name: config-toggle
